_about.what: Test set for the Job Match Radar scoring rubric (fixtures/scoring-prompt.snapshot.md, a frozen snapshot of the rubric under test in the job-match-radar repo). Each case is a real mis-score documented in the source repo's Scoring Calibration log.
_about.anonymization: Company identities are anonymized placeholders (Company A–J); the real employer names tied to each scored listing have been redacted for public release. Role titles, locations, languages, and trigger phrases are preserved verbatim because the gate logic depends on them. The calibration history and gate behavior are otherwise unchanged.

fields.title/company/location: role title and location are real; company is an anonymized placeholder (Company A–J)
fields.description: MINIMAL FIXTURE: a short stand-in JD body that embeds the exact trigger phrase quoted in the calibration log / scoring-prompt.md. The original full JDs are not archived; these fixtures exist only so a LIVE judge (--judge ollama) has body text to parse. The 'replay' judge does not use them.
fields.gate: the pre-flight gate (or rule) that SHOULD fire
fields.type: hard = pre-flight hard cap/auto-reject; soft = precision/soft-cap
fields.expected_cap: the binding (lowest) score the rubric should produce for this case
fields.historical_score: the score the model ACTUALLY gave at the time, per the calibration log (the documented failure)
fields.provenance: post-split = scored under the current Claude rubric (>=2026-04-25); pre-split = Gemini-era, NOT valid evidence about the current rubric, kept for the rule it documents
fields.rule_status: implemented = the gate is written into scoring-prompt.md; recommended = surfaced in calibration but not yet coded (expected to still fail = a known gap, not a regression)
fields.source: calibration-log date the case was documented

_about.pass_rule: A case PASSES when produced_score <= expected_cap (the gate fired). It FAILS when produced_score > expected_cap (the gate was skipped).

cases.title: Senior Technical Product Manager
cases.description: Senior Technical PM on our agentic-AI platform. Fluency in English & German is required. 5-8+ years of technical project management experience.
cases.note: Also trips Q4 specialty seniority floor (5-8yr technical PM -> cap 4). Binding cap is Q2 = 2. Track B Core + AI-native + Watchlist must NOT stack past the hard ceiling.

cases.title: Organized Play Manager
cases.description: Manage organized play across EMEA. Fluency in Italian and/or Portuguese is required, plus regional gaming knowledge. 9-month fixed-term contract.
cases.note: Drove the 2026-05-09 generalization of the language gate beyond German. Also trips the <12-month contract soft cap (6); binding cap is Q2 = 2.

cases.title: Community Manager
cases.description: Own our Berlin community. Salary band 33,000-41,000 EUR/year. Core community management role.
cases.gate: Q5 posted comp below the 80k floor
cases.note: Core CM title would otherwise score 8; posted band's upper bound (41k) is below the 80k hard floor -> cap 2. Drove the addition of pre-flight Q5.

cases.title: Community Engagement Lead, Spain and Portugal
cases.description: Lead community engagement for the Spain and Portugal market. Drive local-market community programs across Iberia.
cases.gate: Territory-named market title outside DACH/EU -> AVOID cap 4
cases.note: Scored 7 as Track A core Community Lead; a title naming a foreign market territory is market-localization, not a core community-lead role -> cap 4.

cases.title: AI & Innovation Lead, Operations
cases.description: Lead AI & innovation in Operations. We are office-first and do not offer remote-only roles. Based in our Amsterdam office.
cases.gate: Remote-policy parse: office-first + non-Berlin office -> cap 3
cases.note: Ideal AI+Ops axis scored 7; explicit no-remote-only language at a non-Berlin office is the real disqualifier -> cap 3.

cases.title: Senior Product Manager (Enterprise)
cases.description: Senior PM for our Enterprise product at Company F, an AI-native workflow-automation platform.
cases.gate: Track B Senior PM at AI-dev-tooling -> seniority soft-cap at 8
cases.note: Right role surfaced; rubric over-claims near-perfect fit. Senior PM is a real seniority stretch -> cap 8, not 9. Domain modifier (+2) must not push past 8.

cases.title: Product Manager II, AI & Data Security
cases.description: PM II on AI & Data Security. This is a hybrid role based in our Paris office (3 days/week on-site).
cases.gate: Hybrid at a non-Berlin EU location -> cap 3 (not EU-remote pass)
cases.note: Recommended 2026-06-19: hybrid non-Berlin is functionally relocation, not EU-remote. The remote-policy parse may partly cover 'hybrid (X days)'; flagged as a known gap until confirmed in the prompt.

cases.title: Senior Manager, Partner Field Operations
cases.description: Senior Manager owning Partner Field Operations at Company H (5,000+ employees). Director-equivalent enterprise leadership role.
cases.gate: Enterprise title-inflation: >1000-employee 'Senior Manager' in a business-ops function -> seniority-floor cap
cases.note: Rejected as too senior. No implemented gate detects enterprise title-inflation yet -> known gap, expected to fail against the current prompt.

cases.title: Community Manager
cases.description: Wir suchen einen Community Manager fuer unser Berliner Team. Du betreust unsere Social-Media-Kanaele und entwickelst Content-Strategien fuer unsere Kunden.
cases.gate: Q1 JD body written in a non-English/Turkish language (German)
cases.note: Pre-2026-04-25 = Gemini-scored, NOT evidence about the current rubric. Kept for the Q1 rule it documents; the 7 is Gemini output.

cases.title: Social Media Manager
cases.description: English-language JD. Requirements: fluent German (Muttersprache or C2) is required for this role.
cases.note: Pre-split Gemini-era. English body but explicit German fluency requirement -> Q2. Kept for the rule; the 8 is Gemini output.

cases.title: Social Media Manager
cases.description: Social Media Manager (m/w/d). Own the content calendar across Instagram and TikTok.
cases.gate: Q3 'Social Media Manager' without a seniority prefix -> cap 6
cases.note: Pre-split Gemini-era. Non-Senior SMM over-scored at 7-8; correct floor is 6. Validated post-split 2026-05-01 (two representative listings accepted as 6).
